reviews.review_description: I think it's a really cool start. I was hoping for a game like this, and now I'm hoping yoy continue with it to make it even better. It's a really neat idea, and I cant wait to see the finished product.

developer_response.body: We're sorry this has happened, we've done some tests and the game should work just fine on a Samsung Note 5. Could you please send us a screenshot showing the error to have a better idea about what's going wrong? Thank you for your input and we're very sorry for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_title: Cool but not enough to do
reviews.review_description: Still might buy the full to try
